analysis_report.title: Summary
analysis_report.content: Based on LSTM neural network analysis of INTC's recent market data, the model predicts an upward price movement for the next trading day with low confidence (51%). This prediction is derived from a combination of technical indicators, price momentum, trading volume patterns, and news sentiment analysis.

analysis_report.title: Price Action & Trend
analysis_report.content: INTC has shown a slight upward trend recently, with a modest average daily return of +0.11%. Over the last 20 trading sessions, the stock moved from $108.15 to $107.93 (-0.2%). The technical score of 51% suggests a neutral technical outlook.

analysis_report.title: Volume Analysis
analysis_report.content: Trading volume is below average (ratio: 0.75x), indicating reduced market participation. Low volume may suggest uncertainty or a potential consolidation phase.

analysis_report.title: News Sentiment
analysis_report.content: News sentiment analysis shows a neutral score of 54%. Recent news coverage about INTC is mixed, with balanced positive and negative reports. A neutral sentiment suggests the market is undecided about future direction.

analysis_report.title: Key Drivers
analysis_report.content: The LSTM model identified the most influential factors for this prediction as: Volatility (12%), MACD Histogram (11%), Momentum (11%). Market volatility is the dominant driver, suggesting high uncertainty in the current market conditions.

analysis_report.title: Model Confidence
analysis_report.content: The LSTM model achieved 53% accuracy and 69% F1-score on the test dataset. These metrics indicate limited predictive reliability. Stock markets are inherently unpredictable, and predictions should be treated with caution. This model is designed for educational and research purposes only and should not be used as the sole basis for investment decisions.
